Here’s what’s in the documents directory and the contents of the evaluation/comparison files.

---

## Documents directory

| File | Contains |
|------|----------|
| `full_prefill_llama8b_results.md` | Full Prefill Pipeline results (Llama-3-8B-Base) |
| `prefill_vs_lemma1k_comparison.md` | Prefill vs LEMMA 1K comparison |
| `base_model_comprehensive_results.md` | Base models vs Instruct models |
| `full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md` | Full FT sweep on Qwen2.5-3B (Wait+Recompute) |
| `lora_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md` | LoRA sweep on Qwen2.5-3B (Wait+Recompute) |
| `full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_results.md` | Full FT sweep on Qwen2.5-3B (GPT-Prefill) |
| `lora_qwen25_3b_base_results.md` | LoRA sweep on Qwen2.5-3B (GPT-Prefill) |

---

## 1. `full_prefill_llama8b_results.md` (140 lines)

Results for the Full Prefill pipeline on Llama-3-8B-Base (2026-03-19).

- **Pipeline**: LEMMA → LLaMA-3-8B generation → GPT Step2 fix → LLaMA-3-8B prefill  
- **Training**: LoRA and Full FT on fix_step2 (498 samples) and wait_recompute_all (2224 samples)  
- **Best setup**: **ft_fix498** — 53.4% GSM8K (+17.4pp vs 36.0% base)  
- **Insight**: Full FT on 498 high-quality samples works best; LoRA is ineffective; noisy data hurts both methods

---

## 2. `prefill_vs_lemma1k_comparison.md` (68 lines)

Prefill vs LEMMA 1K on Llama-3-8B-Base (2026-03-17).

- **Baseline**: GSM8K 10.84%, MATH-500 4.40%  
- **Best LoRA**: Prefill 245 — 12.05% GSM8K, 5.20% MATH-500  
- **Best Full FT**: Prefill 245 — 17.97% GSM8K, 4.60% MATH-500  
- **Conclusion**: Prefill 245 (fewer samples) outperforms LEMMA 1K across methods

---

## 3. `base_model_comprehensive_results.md` (224 lines)

Sweep across base and instruct models (2026-03-15).

- **Models**: Qwen2.5-3B base, Llama-3-8B base, Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct  
- **Datasets**: GPT-Prefill (ds2_fix) and Wait+Recompute  
- **Methods**: LoRA (13 configs), Full FT (10 configs)  
- **Best gains**:  
  - Qwen base: LoRA W+R +0.30 GSM8K, LoRA Prefill +2.60 MATH  
  - Llama base: Full FT Prefill +0.76 GSM8K, +1.60 MATH  

---

## 4. `full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md` (35 lines)

Full FT on Qwen2.5-3B with Wait+Recompute (2026-03-15).

- **Best**: `ft2_wd005` — GSM8K 0.7354 (+0.0038), MATH-500 0.514 (+0.018)  
- 7/10 configs improve GSM8K

---

## 5. `lora_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md` (37 lines)

LoRA on Qwen2.5-3B with Wait+Recompute (2026-03-14).

- **Best**: `v3_lr1e6_r4_a1x` — GSM8K 0.7346 (+0.0030), MATH-500 0.500 (+0.004)  
- 5/13 adapters improve GSM8K

---

## 6. `full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_results.md` (35 lines)

Full FT on Qwen2.5-3B with GPT-Prefill (2026-03-14).

- **Best**: `ft2_wd01` — GSM8K 0.7316 (no change), MATH-500 0.500 (+0.004)  
- 0/10 improve GSM8K; best matches baseline

---

## 7. `lora_qwen25_3b_base_results.md` (37 lines)

LoRA on Qwen2.5-3B with GPT-Prefill (2026-03-14).

- **Best**: `v3_lr5e6_r4_a1x` — GSM8K 0.7339 (+0.0023), MATH-500 0.504 (+0.008)  
- 3/13 adapters improve GSM8K
